api.name: get_trade_signal
api.description: Returns a composite BUY/SELL/HOLD signal with confidence score for any supported asset. Multi-factor scoring engine evaluates momentum, trend structure, derivatives sentiment, and volume conviction across crypto and TradFi perpetuals.

api.name: scan_funding_arb
api.description: Scans cross-venue funding rate differences across Hyperliquid, Binance, Bybit, OKX, and Bitget. Returns top arbitrage opportunities ranked by annualized spread.

minSpreadBps.description: Minimum spread in basis points to include

api.name: get_market_regime
api.description: Classifies the current market regime (TRENDING_UP/DOWN, RANGING, VOLATILE) using multi-dimensional analysis with cross-venue funding sentiment.

coins.description: Array of asset symbols to analyze

api.name: search_knowledge
api.description: BM25 lexical search over AlgoVault's knowledge bundle (every MCP tool description, response shape, integration tutorial, and code example). Free, no quota cost. Use BEFORE calling other tools to confirm correct parameter usage.

api.name: chat_knowledge
api.description: Ask AlgoVault a natural-language question; get a synthesized answer with citations grounded in the canonical knowledge bundle. Quota: Free 10/mo, Starter 50/mo, Pro 200/mo, Enterprise 2000/mo.

meta.title: Crypto Quant Signal MCP
meta.description: Composite BUY/SELL/HOLD trade calls across 5 crypto perp venues (Binance, Bybit, OKX, Bitget, Hyperliquid). Verified track record, Merkle-anchored on Base L2. Drop-in tutorials for LangChain, LlamaIndex, Microsoft Agent Framework, and CrewAI. Ask-AlgoVault-anything via search_knowledge + chat_knowledge tools.
